name: Chaithanya Kumar Gogula
title: Senior VMware Administrator | Virtualization & Infrastructure Specialist
about: VMware Administrator with 9 years of expertise in designing, managing, and securing enterprise-scale virtualization environments across healthcare, retail, and consulting domains. Adept at VMware vSphere, vCenter, ESXi, vSAN with proven ability to drive infrastructure modernization, improve system resilience, and reduce operational costs.
skills: HPE Synergy, Cisco UCS, Dell Servers

points: Managing 50,000+ VMs and 6000+ ESXi hosts across multiple data centers
Designed VMware clusters with HA/DRS achieving 99.99% uptime
Automated deployments reducing provisioning time by 40%
Worked on vSAN, storage provisioning, and LUN configuration
Reduced MTTR by 30% by resolving ESXi host failures
Handled VMware patching and upgrades using Update Manager
Automated Windows patching using SCCM & Shavlik
Improved monitoring with SolarWinds and vRops
Improved monitoring using Nagios and Tivoli
